name: Wicked Serpent Night Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>邪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>悪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>エビルナイト・ドラゴン
name_jp_tl: Evil Knight Dragon, the Wicked Dragon
desc: You can Tribute 1 DARK monster from your hand or field; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Wicked Serpent Night Dragon" once per turn. When this card is destroyed by battle: You can target 1 monster your opponent controls; send it to the GY, then you can Special Summon this card.
mnst_eff: You can Tribute 1 DARK monster from your hand or field; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Wicked Serpent Night Dragon" once per turn. When this card is destroyed by battle: You can target 1 monster your opponent controls; send it to the GY, then you can Special Summon this card.
eff: You can Tribute 1 DARK monster from your hand or field; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Wicked Serpent Night Dragon" once per turn. When this card is destroyed by battle: You can target 1 monster your opponent controls; send it to the GY, then you can Special Summon this card.

action: Sends from your opponent's field to your opponent's Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
